visual_description: The man in the white shirt and black tie stands beside a television displaying CCTV footage of a person in an elevator, speaking and gesturing with his right hand. Two seated men are shown, one in a police uniform with shoulder insignia looking forward with a surprised expression, and another in a light blue shirt and tie looking downward. The scene takes place in a dimly lit office environment with glass partitions in the background.
audio_description: The standing man's voice is audible as he speaks and gestures, while the seated men remain quiet. No other distinct sounds are present.
